requests.concept_text: iOS 26.3 정식 출시 완료 (업데이트 도착) A still life on a soft cream surface. A modern smartphone screen-up showing a clean abstract download-arrow silhouette in soft orange (no text, no UI, no version numbers). Beside the phone, a small generic gift-ribbon shape in muted warm beige, suggesting "new release". Soft natural daylight, gentle shadow. No logos.

안드로이드 → 아이폰 이전 개선 A top-down flat lay on a warm white surface. Two modern smartphone silhouettes side by side, both screen-up, with a faint orange dashed arrow flowing from the left phone to the right phone. Small generic icon-card silhouettes (photo, contact, app) floating along the arrow path. Soft daylight, clean editorial composition. No logos.

타사 워치 알림 전달 A close-up still life on a light beige tabletop. A modern smartphone screen-up at one side, a generic round smartwatch (no brand markings, no readable text) at the other side, both connected by a soft orange ripple line in between. Subtle bell-shape silhouette glowing on the watch face. Bright airy lighting.

빠른 페어링 근접 자동 A still life on a soft cream desk. A modern smartphone in the center, screen showing a clean abstract bluetooth-wave silhouette in soft orange. Around the phone, three small generic accessory silhouettes (earbuds, watch, headphone) arranged in a half-circle, each connected by a faint orange dotted line. Soft natural daylight.

시리 업그레이드 전초전 A still life on a warm white surface. A modern smartphone screen-up showing a clean abstract voice-wave silhouette in soft orange (no text, no UI). A subtle orange aura around the wave, suggesting "evolving intelligence". Soft daylight, clean editorial composition. No real faces, no logos.
